problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
